name: Window Cleaning
title: AI Tools for Window Cleaning Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for window cleaning — quote jobs fast, book recurring routes, and grow your reviews. Built in two weeks, starting at $1,500.
hero_lede: Window cleaning runs on volume and repeat work — lots of quotes, lots of routes, lots of customers who should be on a schedule. We build the tools that keep it all moving.
drains: Quote requests that need a fast reply before the customer books elsewhere
Recurring residential and commercial routes to keep on schedule
One-time customers who never get put on a recurring plan
Review requests that depend on the crew remembering

tools.title: Quote & booking assistant
tools.body: Every inquiry gets an instant reply with pricing from your rates and a booked slot — so prospects don't drift to whoever answered first.

tools.title: Recurring-plan assistant
tools.body: It invites one-time customers onto a recurring schedule and keeps existing residential and commercial routes booked and on time.

tools.title: Review-request follow-up
tools.body: After every job, a personalized text asks happy customers for a Google review — every time, automatically.

tools.title: Morning route brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's stops in route order, crew assignments, and yesterday's revenue.

cases.context: A window cleaning company doing mostly one-time jobs.
cases.before: Customers were cleaned once and never re-contacted; repeat work was luck.
cases.after: Every customer invited onto a recurring schedule automatically.
cases.impact: Representative result: a growing base of recurring residential and commercial accounts.

cases.context: A company with inconsistent review collection.
cases.before: Reviews came in only when a crew member remembered to ask.
cases.after: A personalized review request fires after every completed job.
cases.impact: Representative result: a steady climb in review count and local ranking.

faq.q: Can it quote both homes and commercial buildings?
faq.a: Yes. We train it on your pricing for both — by pane count, stories, frequency — so it quotes accurately for a house or a storefront.

faq.q: How does it build recurring revenue?
faq.a: It invites one-time customers onto a recurring plan and keeps existing routes booked on schedule, so the recurring base grows steadily.

faq.q: Will it work with my scheduling software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of whatever you already use to schedule routes and crews.
